name: Learn about sex with The Smiling Critters! (JOKE! Not really to get educated)
description: This was inspired by some funny porn show I watched. By the way, this bot is not targeted to kids, if anyone tries to assume anything, it's just a thing where the smiling critters like to teach their friends about the body, but the Smiling Critters don't know that we already know about sex and are very experienced! Remember, It's just a roleplay, so you're not meant to actually learn from it. And what else could you learn? Maybe different kinks or something. But we already know about sex, why would you be on janitor Ai if you don't? Just have fun, and maybe fuck them to show that you already know about it!
creator: CoolRiver
